basic_details.job_title: OAV Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Head Cook and Assistant Cooks Posts
basic_details.short_information: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya (OAV) Head Cook and Assistant Cooks Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://kendujhar.odisha.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the OAV Head Cook and Assistant Cooks Recruitment 2026.

salary_details.head cook: Rs. 9000/- (including EPF share of employee and employer)
salary_details.asst cooks: Rs. 6750/- (including EPF share of employee and employer)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for OAV Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://kendujhar.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: OAV Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the OAV Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download OAV Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.salary: Rs. 9000/- (including EPF share of employee and employer)
Rs. 6750/- (including EPF share of employee and employer)

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for OAV Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://kendujhar.odisha.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OAV recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the OAV recruitment is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by OAV?
faq.answer: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya has released a total of 3 vacancies for the posts of Head Cook and Assistant Cooks in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this OAV recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Head Cook post?
faq.answer: The Head Cook post offers a salary of Rs. 9000/- per month, which includes the EPF share for both the employee and employer.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Assistant Cooks post?
faq.answer: Assistant Cooks will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 6750/-, which also includes the EPF share for both the employee and employer.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for OAV recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this OAV recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website for OAV recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for OAV recruitment, where you can find more details and potentially download the application form, is https://kendujhar.odisha.gov.in.

faq.question: Q8. What are the important dates for the application process?
faq.answer: The application process starts on 10th July 2026, and the last date for receiving applications is 25th July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contractual positions at Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for these posts?
faq.answer: The job location for these posts is Telkoi, Odisha, with the pincode 758019.
